final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: equipment icon set for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate equipment icon sheet for current equipment variants.
Subject: fifteen fantasy equipment icons in a clean 5x3 sheet: shortsword, buckler, coin purse, healing charm, leather gloves, twin blades, tower shield, merchant scales, hearth amulet, war banner, ruby brooch, champion plate, royal seal, mirror charm, battle drum.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game inventory icons, crisp silhouettes, mobile slot readable.
Composition/framing: 5x3 icon sheet, equal-size centered items, transparent-background cutout feel, no labels.
Lighting/mood: collectible RPG equipment, clear item identity.
Color palette: steel, leather, gold, ruby, parchment, warm highlights, varied but cohesive.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid tiny detail and duplicated silhouettes.
generation_mode: built-in imagegen chroma-key fallback plus deterministic adaptive extraction
